owner.name: Bishwa Jung Shah
owner.description: A Fullstack Developer specializing in modern web technologies with a passion for building functional and visually appealing applications.
owner.detailedDescription: I focus on integrating smooth animations and interactive elements to enhance the user experience while ensuring performance optimization and clean code. I strive to deliver well-crafted projects that not only look good but are technically sound, focusing on code quality, web performance, and SEO best practices. My primary work involves front-end technologies like Vue.js and Node.js, with experience in managing backend services and handling databases like MongoDB and Postgres.
owner.current_focus: Fullstack development using Vue.js, Nuxt, React, Next.js, Hono.js, and Nest.js
professional_background: Junior Developer at Hyteno/Morgenland (8 months) - Developed web applications with Vue.js and Nuxt
Intern at Mediaholic (5 months) - Worked on Vue.js projects and contributed to front-end development
hobbies: Writing blogs to share knowledge and experiences
Creating and contributing to open-source projects
Building Discord bots and Telegram bots
Trying out new technologies and frameworks

backendExperience.description: Experienced in building scalable backend APIs and services using Nest.js and Hono.js frameworks

workExperience.responsibilities: Developed web applications, improved coding skills, and worked with Vue.js.
Worked on Vue.js projects and contributed to front-end development.
